name.description: Pick a clear, action-oriented name your users will recognize.

skills.description: Capabilities the agent can perform. Add skills from your library or create new ones.

instructions.description: Tell the agent who it is, how it should behave, and when its job is done. Use ## headings to structure (Role, Backstory, Goal, Task).
examples: ## Role You are an HR onboarding assistant…
## Goal The user has submitted their I-9 and reviewed the handbook.

conversationStarters.description: Suggested prompts shown to users when they open this agent.

guardrails.description: Topics or actions the agent must NOT handle. Be specific.

createWithAI.creatingDescription: AI is building your agent configuration
createWithAI.errorDefault: An unexpected error occurred. Please try again.

deleteModal.title: Delete "{{agentName}}"?
deleteModal.descriptionDraft: This draft agent will be permanently removed.
